summary: Planned conservative live PR inventory classifications for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are executed in plan mode; no cluster-scoped fix artifact is allowed by the job.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with non-security Feishu behavior work, but failing real-behavior proof and review-bot blockers make closure or merge unsafe. Keep it as an independent open PR for proof/review follow-up.

This is a standalone automation/test PR with clear failing proof/checks and waiting-on-author state. Because low-signal closure is disabled and the diff is not safely superseded by a hydrated canonical item, keep it independent.

This PR overlaps with #87888 and #91434 but is not safe to close or mark fixed-by-candidate from this inventory shard. Keep it related to the hydrated toolless-model/tool-prep family pending maintainer review.

This is related to earlier merged documentation sweeps, but it remains an open dirty maintainer-review PR with broad documentation surface. It is not safely closable as duplicate or superseded from this shard.
This is an active draft maintainer PR in the same plugin-sdk hardening area as #89263. It should remain open for maintainer review and author follow-up, not closed or merged by inventory cleanup.
